task.create: INSERT INTO tasks (project_id, creator_id, assignee_id, title, description, status, priority, due_date) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7, $8) RETURNING id, project_id, creator_id, assignee_id, title, description, status, priority, due_date, created_at, updated_at;
task.getById: SELECT id, project_id, creator_id, assignee_id, title, description, status, priority, due_date, created_at, updated_at FROM tasks WHERE id = $1;
task.update: UPDATE tasks SET title = COALESCE($2, title), description = COALESCE($3, description), due_date = COALESCE($4, due_date) WHERE id = $1 RETURNING id, project_id, creator_id, assignee_id, title, description, status, priority, due_date, created_at, updated_at;
task.updateStatus: UPDATE tasks SET status = $2 WHERE id = $1 RETURNING id, project_id, creator_id, assignee_id, title, description, status, priority, due_date, created_at, updated_at;
task.updatePriority: UPDATE tasks SET priority = $2 WHERE id = $1 RETURNING id, project_id, creator_id, assignee_id, title, description, status, priority, due_date, created_at, updated_at;
task.assign: UPDATE tasks SET assignee_id = $2 WHERE id = $1 RETURNING id, project_id, creator_id, assignee_id, title, description, status, priority, due_date, created_at, updated_at;
task.list: SELECT id, project_id, creator_id, assignee_id, title, description, status, priority, due_date, created_at, updated_at FROM tasks WHERE ($1::uuid IS NULL OR project_id = $1) AND ($2::uuid IS NULL OR assignee_id = $2) AND ($3::varchar IS NULL OR status = $3) AND ($4::varchar IS NULL OR priority = $4) AND ($5::date IS NULL OR due_date >= $5) AND ($6::date IS NULL OR due_date <= $6) ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT $7 OFFSET $8;
task.count: SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS total FROM tasks WHERE ($1::uuid IS NULL OR project_id = $1) AND ($2::uuid IS NULL OR assignee_id = $2) AND ($3::varchar IS NULL OR status = $3) AND ($4::varchar IS NULL OR priority = $4) AND ($5::date IS NULL OR due_date >= $5) AND ($6::date IS NULL OR due_date <= $6);
